name: TECHY Electronics Repair Franchise - Sunrise/BrandsMart
name_evidence: Moderate-confidence brand unmasking, but the exact unit still needs broker confirmation. The [BizQuest listing](https://www.bizquest.com/business-for-sale/brandsmart-cellphone-computer-repair-device-sales-shop-sunrise-fl/BW2485508/) names the seller broker as Dr. Phone Fix, Inc. and the indexed listing text says the opportunity is a TECHY Electronics Repair franchise. Public pages for [Techy Sunrise](https://techysunrise.com/) show the matching cell-phone/computer/electronics repair concept near Sunrise/Plantation, with [Chamber](https://www.chamberofcommerce.com/business-directory/florida/plantation/mobile-phone-repair-shop/2017672927-techy-sunrise), [Cylex](https://www.cylex.us.com/company/techy-sunrise-33357336.html), and [Techy corporate](https://techycompany.com/sunrise-westplantation-fl) pages confirming the operating brand. The BrandsMart/Sunrise store address should still be verified with the seller.
ai_opportunity: AI diagnostics, managed IT expansion, remote monitoring, automated ticket systems, B2B service contracts, cybersecurity offerings, and automated inventory management.
notes: Exact BizQuest listing from the AlexNaHub lead table. Source shows $100,000 asking price, two full-time employees, three years in operation, and $10,000 inventory not included in asking price. Cash flow and revenue are not disclosed.
